mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auto_invest_executions (auto_invest_stock_id, round_no, trigger_source, side, exec_date, status, fail_reason, order_id, exec_amount, exec_quantity, currency) VALUES (#{autoInvestStockId}, #{roundNo}, #{triggerSource}, #{side}, #{execDate}, #{status}, #{failReason}, #{orderId}, #{execAmount}, #{execQuantity}, #{currency})
mapper.select: SELECT id, auto_invest_stock_id, round_no, trigger_source, side, exec_date, status, fail_reason, order_id, exec_amount, exec_quantity, currency, created_at FROM auto_invest_executions WHERE auto_invest_stock_id = #{autoInvestStockId} ORDER BY round_no DESC
